content: just_audio GitHub issue #294 (smkhalsa, Feb 2021, open): ConcatenatingAudioSource with ~1000 children takes >20s to load. Maintainer note: useLazyPreparation:true (Android) and experimental treadmill branch (iOS) mitigate. Relevant to Flow Book because initSongs uses preload:playImmediately (true) which forces eager load of the initial source — for Sound-Books with unknown duration this triggers a network probe. GitHub issues search for 'play loading state race' returned only #294 and #263 (setAudioSource throws PlatformException on second call) — no direct issue for 'play() silently dropped during loading'. Per official state model docs, play() during loading is NOT dropped — playing=true sticks and audio starts on ready. The Flow Book bug may be fork-specific (sagarchaulagai/just_audio@a6f8db8) or caused by the seek-after-setAudioSources dance, not by play() being dropped.
